overview: A cinematic Spider-Man inspired portfolio website with a real YouTube video background, neon cyan and red glow effects, advanced animations powered by Framer Motion and GSAP, and a working contact form via Formspree.
features: Full-screen Spider-Man cinematic YouTube video background
Neon cyan and red glow effects on text, buttons, and interactive elements
Cinematic scroll-triggered animations across all 5 sections
Hero section with GSAP stagger and mouse parallax
Working contact form with Formspree (submissions to rajeshkutty2k5@gmail.com)
Skills section with animated skill bars and badges
Responsive design for all screen sizes
